[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011100 3
1 1100110 4
2 0011001 3
3 1111000 4
4 1111101 6
5 1011000 3
6 0011101 4
7 1111110 6

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0011000 2
23 32 0011000 2
34 43 0000100 1
45 54 0000000 a
56 65 0011000 2
67 76 1100000 2
70 07 1000000 1

02 20 0001000 1
13 31 0011100 3 match 0
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0011000 2
46 64 1100000 2
57 75 0000001 1
60 06 1001000 2
71 17 0000101 2

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0000100 1
25 52 0011000 2
36 63 0011000 2
47 74 1100100 3
50 05 0001000 1
61 16 0011000 2
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 1000000 1
15 51 0011001 3 match 2
26 62 0011000 2
37 73 0000100 1
